desc: United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) data tracking irrigation from 2022 census.

columns.name: source_desc
columns.desc: Source of data (CENSUS or SURVEY). Census program includes the Census of Ag as well as follow up projects. Survey program includes national, state, and county surveys.

columns.name: sector_desc
columns.desc: Five high level, broad categories useful to narrow down choices (Crops, Animals & Products, Economics, Demographics, and Environmental).

columns.name: group_desc
columns.desc: Subsets within sector (e.g., under sector = Crops, the groups are Field Crops, Fruit & Tree Nuts, Horticulture, and Vegetables).

columns.name: commodity_desc
columns.desc: The primary subject of interest (e.g., CORN, CATTLE, LABOR, TRACTORS, OPERATORS)

columns.name: class_desc
columns.desc: Generally a physical attribute (e.g., variety, size, color, gender) of the commodity.

columns.name: prodn_practice_desc
columns.desc: A method of production or action taken on the commodity (e.g., IRRIGATED, ORGANIC, ON FEED).

columns.name: util_practice_desc
columns.desc: Utilizations (e.g., GRAIN, FROZEN, SLAUGHTER) or marketing channels (e.g., FRESH MARKET, PROCESSING, RETAIL).

columns.name: statisticcat_desc
columns.desc: The aspect of a commodity being measured (e.g., AREA HARVESTED, PRICE RECEIVED, INVENTORY, SALES).

columns.name: unit_desc
columns.desc: The unit associated with the statistic category (e.g., ACRES, $ / LB, HEAD, $, OPERATIONS).

columns.name: short_desc
columns.desc: A concatenation of six columns: commodity_desc, class_desc, prodn_practice_desc, util_practice_desc, statisticcat_desc, and unit_desc.

columns.name: domain_desc
columns.desc: Generally another characteristic of operations that produce a particular commodity (e.g., ECONOMIC CLASS, AREA OPERATED, NAICS CLASSIFICATION, SALES). For chemical usage data, the domain describes the type of chemical applied to the commodity. The domain = TOTAL will have no further breakouts; i.e., the data value pertains completely to the short_desc.

columns.name: domaincat_desc
columns.desc: Categories or partitions within a domain (e.g., under domain = Sales, domain categories include $1,000 TO $9,999, $10,000 TO $19,999, etc).

columns.name: agg_level_desc
columns.desc: Aggregation level or geographic granularity of the data (e.g., State, Ag District, County, Region, Zip Code).

columns.name: state_ansi
columns.desc: American National Standards Institute (ANSI) standard 2-digit state codes.

columns.name: state_fips_code
columns.desc: NASS 2-digit state codes; include 99 and 98 for US TOTAL and OTHER STATES, respectively; otherwise match ANSI codes.

columns.name: state_alpha
columns.desc: State abbreviation, 2-character alpha code.

columns.name: state_name
columns.desc: State full name.

columns.name: asd_code
columns.desc: NASS defined county groups, unique within a state, 2-digit ag statistics district code.

columns.name: asd_desc
columns.desc: Ag statistics district name.

columns.name: county_ansi
columns.desc: ANSI standard 3-digit county codes.

columns.name: county_code
columns.desc: NASS 3-digit county codes; includes 998 for OTHER (COMBINED) COUNTIES and Alaska county codes; otherwise match ANSI codes.

columns.name: county_name
columns.desc: County name.

columns.name: location_desc
columns.desc: Full description for the location dimension.

columns.name: year
columns.desc: The numeric year of the data.

columns.name: freq_desc
columns.desc: Length of time covered (Annual, Season, Monthly, Weekly, Point in Time). Monthly often covers more than one month. Point in Time is as of a particular day.

columns.name: Value
columns.desc: Published data value or suppression reason code.

columns.name: CV (%)
columns.desc: Coefficient of variation. Available for the 2012 Census of Agriculture only (county-level CVs are generalized). Suppressed data is marked as '(D)' for privacy disclosure, '(H)' for high statistical error/unreliability, or '(L)' for values too low to round.
